titleStmt.title: SII 36.307: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 307. (A.R. No. 307 of 1910.) ĀMŪR, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On a boulder in a field in the village.

summary.p: Damaged and incomplete. Chēdiyarāyar of the Nāḍu, administrators of the village jointly granted 3(3/4) vēlis of land to the temple of Tiruvagattīśvaramuḍaiya Mahādēva at Āṉmūr in Tirumuṉaippāḍi Mēlāṉmūrnāḍu for providing sacred food offering. The tax pāḍi-kāval was also exempted in favour of the temple. The inscription also refers to an earlier grant of land made by Kulōttuṅgachōḻa Kāḍavarāyar for providing a lamp in the same temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvana ccakravattikaḷ śrī rā
jarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu pattāvatu tirumuṉaippāṭi
melāṉmūr nāṭṭu Āṉmūr tiruvakattīśva
ramuṭaiya mahādevarkku Ivvūr Āḷuṭai
yārkaḷum Iṉṉāṭṭil cetiyarāyarum Iṉ
ṉāyanār śrīhastattile nīrvārtta nilam maṭṭai
vākkālukku meṟkum Akkam pulattu teṟkum ka
kku kum melaraca
tūkkup puḷikku vaṭakkum melācaṟuti Āka mukkurikku mūṉṟarai
veliyum kulottuṅkacoḻak kāṭavarāyar nāyanārkku tirunantāviḷakkukku viṭṭa nilam
kāṟiceykku meltalai tevatāṉattoṭe ceraviṭṭa nila māttūṟum Iṉ nilam mūṉṟēmukkā
l veli tiṟaiyan mokaṉāḷappiṟan=tāṉāṉa tirunīṟṟuttoṇṭaimāneṉ Iṉ nilattāl van=ta pāṭi
kāval kalamum nāyaṉāṟku Amutu
kkuṭutteṉ Ittanma
m colluvār gaṅ
kai kumariyiṭaic ceytār pāvaṅ ko
ḷvār Iṉṉāyanār śrī kāriyam ceyvittā
ṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭa
Digital edition of SII 36.307 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
